member.name: T:API.Controllers.AIController
member.summary: AI-powered object detection endpoints using GECO2 few-shot counting model. Enables annotators to use AI-assisted labeling by providing 1-3 exemplar bounding boxes, after which the AI detects all similar objects in the image.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.AIController.#ctor(BLL.Interfaces.IAIService)
member.summary: Initializes the AI controller with the AI detection service.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.AIController.DetectObjects(Core.DTOs.Requests.AIDetectRequest)
member.param: Detection request with image URL and exemplar boxes.
member.returns: Detection result with object count and annotated image URL.

member.name: M:API.Controllers.AIController.GetServiceStatus
member.summary: Checks whether the AI detection service (GECO2 HuggingFace Space) is currently available. Useful for showing service status in the UI before the user attempts detection.
